name: Tax
tagline: Prep returns, research positions, and organize records with agents that keep taxpayer data on your machine.
heroTitle: An AI tax preparer that guards the data.
heroSubtitle: Organize source documents, research positions, and draft work papers with agents that run on your own machine. Taxpayer data never leaves your device unless you say so, and every model call is governed, logged, and auditable.
intro: Tax work handles some of the most sensitive personal and business data there is, and it can't be pasted into a public chatbot that trains on what it sees. Ryu runs capable agents locally, redacts identifiers on egress when you route to the cloud, and records every call, so prep and research move faster while taxpayer data stays protected.

highlights.title: Taxpayer data stays private
highlights.description: Run a local Gemma 4 on install, or route to a cloud model with PII and DLP redaction on every request.

highlights.title: Grounded in your references
highlights.description: Ground agents on your internal guidance and a client's prior returns with Spaces and RAG, so answers cite the source.

highlights.title: Auditable by default
highlights.description: Every model and tool call is logged in the Gateway audit trail, so each position has a record of what the agent considered.

highlights.title: Connects to your tools
highlights.description: Agents authenticate into spreadsheets, document stores, and email to gather source documents and draft summaries for review.

useCases.title: Source document organization
useCases.description: Sort a pile of W-2s, 1099s, receipts, and statements into a labeled checklist, flagging what is missing for the return.

useCases.title: Return preparation support
useCases.description: Extract figures from source documents into a work paper and reconcile them against last year's return for a preparer to verify.

useCases.title: Tax research
useCases.description: Research a position across your internal guidance and reference library, with answers quoting the rule and the document.

useCases.title: Deduction and credit review
useCases.description: Scan a client's records for deductions and credits they may have missed, with the supporting entries cited for review.

useCases.title: Client questionnaire and follow-up
useCases.description: Turn an engagement into a tailored questionnaire, then draft follow-up requests for the documents still outstanding.

useCases.title: Prior-year comparison
useCases.description: Compare this year's figures to prior returns, explain the largest changes, and flag items worth a closer look.

examplePrompts: Sort these uploaded documents into a tax-prep checklist and tell me what is still missing.
Extract the income figures from these 1099s into a work paper and reconcile against last year's return.
Research whether this expense qualifies as deductible, quoting the relevant guidance in our library.
Review this client's records for deductions or credits they may have missed, with the entries behind each.
Compare this year's figures to the prior return and explain the largest changes.

faq.q: Is taxpayer data safe with Ryu?
faq.a: Yes. Ryu is local-first: you can run a model entirely on your machine with no telemetry. When you route to a cloud model, the Gateway redacts PII and sensitive data on egress and logs the call, so taxpayer information stays governed end to end.

faq.q: Can it research tax positions reliably?
faq.a: Ground agents on your internal guidance and reference library with Spaces and RAG so answers cite the source. Treat the result as research for a qualified preparer to confirm against current rules before relying on it.

faq.q: Does it file returns for me?
faq.a: No. Ryu organizes records, drafts work papers, and researches positions for a qualified tax professional to review and file. The audit trail records what the agent considered, so the review is fast and defensible.

ctaTitle: Give your practice an AI tax preparer.
ctaSubtitle: Organize, research, and prep faster, with taxpayer data kept private and every call on the record.
ctaNote: Local-first · PII/DLP redaction · Full audit trail
